isolation.testEnvironment: bun test with OpenTUI test renderer

assertions.title: Zero-worktree startup shows the welcome screen and creation shortcut

steps.action: Run bun test to verify WelcomeScreen component
steps.expected: Welcome screen renders with 'Welcome to Rudu' message
steps.observed: Test passes - WelcomeScreen.test.tsx renders welcome message

steps.action: Verify 'No worktrees yet' message is displayed
steps.expected: Zero-worktree state shows clear empty message
steps.observed: Test passes - WelcomeScreen shows 'No worktrees yet' message

steps.expected: Welcome screen displays keyboard shortcut hint
steps.observed: Test passes - WelcomeScreen.test.tsx confirms 'Ctrl+N' is shown in frame

steps.expected: App component shows welcome screen when no worktrees exist
steps.observed: Test passes - App.test.tsx 'App shows welcome screen when zero worktrees exist'

evidence.testOutput: All 3 WelcomeScreen tests pass (welcome message, no worktrees message, Ctrl+N shortcut)

assertions.title: Ctrl+N opens a create-worktree dialog with focused title input

steps.expected: Ctrl+N keybinding exists and opens create dialog
steps.observed: App.tsx lines 296-299: if (key.ctrl && key.name === 'n') calls handleOpenCreateDialog()

steps.action: Check CreateWorktreeDialog renders with title input
steps.observed: Test passes - CreateWorktreeDialog.test.tsx renders title input and shows 'Create New Worktree' header
CreateWorktreeDialog.tsx line 146: input has focused={true} prop set

steps.expected: Footer displays 'Enter Submit | Escape Cancel' when dialog is open
steps.observed: Footer.tsx line 21-22: Returns 'Enter Submit | Escape Cancel' when mode is createWorktree

evidence.testOutput: CreateWorktreeDialog tests pass (title input renders, keyboard help shows)

assertions.title: The dialog previews the derived branch and sibling path from the title

steps.observed: CreateWorktreeDialog.tsx lines 21-48: calculatePreviews uses deriveBranchName and deriveSiblingPath

steps.action: Check unit tests for derivation logic
steps.observed: 8 tests pass: deriveBranchName (7 tests) and deriveSiblingPath (5 tests) and previewWorktreeNames

steps.expected: Dialog shows branch and path previews when title is entered
steps.observed: CreateWorktreeDialog.tsx lines 127-136: Renders 'Preview:' section with Branch and Path when previews is not null

steps.expected: Title converts to lowercase, spaces become hyphens, special chars removed
steps.observed: deriveBranchName function: toLowerCase, replace spaces with hyphens, remove special chars, prefix with 'rudu/'

evidence.testOutput: All derivation tests pass - branch name: lowercase, hyphens for spaces, 'rudu/' prefix; sibling path: parent dir + normalized title

assertions.title: Invalid or blank titles cannot create a worktree

steps.expected: validateTitle function checks for valid input
steps.observed: CreateWorktreeDialog.tsx lines 69-79: validateTitle checks empty, min length (2), and character patterns

steps.expected: Empty or whitespace-only titles are rejected
steps.observed: Validation returns { valid: false, error: 'Title is required' } for empty/whitespace titles

steps.expected: Titles less than 2 characters are rejected
steps.observed: Validation returns { valid: false, error: 'Title must be at least 2 characters' }

steps.expected: Only letters, numbers, spaces, and hyphens allowed
steps.observed: Regex /^\w[\w\s-]*$/ validates title; error: 'Title can only contain letters, numbers, spaces, and hyphens'

steps.expected: Invalid titles prevent onSubmit from being called
steps.observed: handleSubmit (lines 110-117): sets attemptedSubmit, validates, returns early if invalid

steps.expected: Validation errors are shown to user
steps.observed: Lines 119-120: showValidationError computed from attemptedSubmit && validationError; Line 151: Renders error text in theme.status.failed color
GitWorktreeService.ts lines 139-149: Validates title.trim() empty and length < 2 before proceeding

evidence.testOutput: Validation logic exists at both UI and service layers; errors displayed inline in dialog

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 4 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. All assertions have comprehensive test coverage through bun test. The WelcomeScreen component correctly shows the zero-worktree state with Ctrl+N shortcut. The CreateWorktreeDialog opens with focused title input, shows real-time branch/path previews as the user types, and blocks submission of invalid/blank titles with visible validation errors.
